query.description: Temporal visibility query. The SQL-like WHERE clause accepted by Temporal's ListWorkflow endpoint, e.g. "ExecutionStatus = 'Running'".

reason.description: Reason string attached to every WorkflowExecutionTerminated event for this batch. Surfaces in the UI/CLI workflow history.

details.description: Optional details payload forwarded to the SDK's TerminateWorkflow call. Encoded with the default JSON DataConverter.

limit.description: Maximum number of workflow executions the visibility query returns (single page).

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent terminate requests. Capped at 100.
